failedAssertions.reason: BLOCKED: Could not trigger lockout state after 9+ failed login attempts. Backend lockout threshold is unknown/configured higher than test attempts. Lockout UI is implemented but could not be exercised.

BLOCKED: Cannot test tenant runtime denials (TENANT_ON_HOLD, TENANT_BLOCKED, TENANT_REQUEST_RATE_EXCEEDED) without backend administrator action to change tenant state. Frontend code review confirms runtime denial handling is implemented.

BLOCKED: No seeded TOTP codes or recovery codes available for MFA-enabled validation accounts. The MFA disable UI exists with code/recovery-code toggle but cannot complete MFA verification to reach profile page.
BLOCKED: No seeded test account in must-change-password state. The change-password corridor UI is implemented but cannot test blocking behavior without a seeded account with mustChangePassword flag.

MFA state survives reload but protected destination is NOT restored after MFA success. Users always land at /hub regardless of where they started. The pending MFA state only stores {email, password, companyCode} but not the intended destination URL.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated Flow Validator Guidance with MFA test account seeding requirements and session ID format

working: Invalid credentials show clear retryable message, form stays editable
MFA-required login correctly redirects to /mfa challenge state
Pending MFA state survives page reload in sessionStorage
MFA verification supports TOTP with retry on invalid codes
MFA setup shows QR, manual secret, and recovery codes with acknowledgement requirement
MFA activation preserves retry state on invalid code
Forgot-password uses canonical path, no retired superadmin alias
Reset-password handles missing/invalid tokens with clear recovery messaging
Logout clears session and allows immediate fresh login
issues: VAL-CROSS-002: Protected deep link destination not restored after MFA success - always lands at /hub
VAL-AUTH-002: Lockout testing blocked - need backend config or seeded lockout state
VAL-AUTH-003: Tenant denial testing blocked - need backend tenant state changes
VAL-AUTH-010: MFA disable testing blocked - need seeded TOTP/recovery codes
VAL-AUTH-014: Must-change-password testing blocked - need seeded account in password-change-required state
recommendations: Store intended destination URL in pending MFA state for VAL-CROSS-002 fix
Seed test accounts with known MFA secrets for VAL-AUTH-010
Seed one test account with mustChangePassword flag for VAL-AUTH-014
Document backend lockout threshold or provide lockout-state seeding for VAL-AUTH-002
Provide backend admin action capability for tenant state changes for VAL-AUTH-003
